data.name: Soul Saber 2
data.detailed_description:
Requirements

  • 若要充分享受這部作品，推薦使用遊戲手把來進行遊。
  • 若要進行網路連線對戰，則必須要有LAG少的網路環境和進行路由器的傳輸埠開放設定。
  • 購買前請先從右邊連結下載體驗版，確認您所使用的電腦系統是否符合遊戲動作條件。


關於此遊戲


可享受急速隊伍戰鬥樂趣的對戰行動作射擊遊戲在steam登場
做為戰鬥機械兵戰勝，獲得最強的稱號！

全部19個各有個性的戰鬥用機械兵們

女性型、美少女型之外，男性型、金屬機械型等等…多彩的外型之外，各自持有格鬥戰重視、遠距離支援型、全能型、速度特化、大艦巨砲主義等特殊的戰鬥類型。戰鬥獲得勝利，賺取得分將所有角色解鎖！

脫衣要素

傷害的累積會反映到衣服上。女性角色中彈過多則會看到那姿樣……

隨著角色組合而千變萬化的戰鬥要素

戰況無時無刻都在變化。若善用自方的有利點，攻擊敵方的弱點，則可能從壓倒性的不利狀態中逆轉。

容易上手深奧的操作性

可以選擇簡易操作和上級者向操作，各自還可以調整改變。
就算是初學者也能享受高回應的戰鬥，若習慣了操作則可採取更複雜的戰術。

data.short_description: 可享受急速隊伍戰鬥樂趣的對戰行動作射擊遊戲在steam登場。 最大對應6人對6人網路對戰。 做為戰鬥機械兵戰勝，獲得最強的稱號！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“Blast Enemies (And Their Clothes) To Pieces In Multiplayer Shooter Soul Saber 2”
Siliconera

“ハイスピード“脱衣”アクションSTG『Soul Saber 2』 Steam規定のギリギリ？を目指した作品が配信開始”
もぐらゲームス

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, 7, Vista, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo 2.4Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0b compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0b
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound compatible
  • 備註: Gamepad is highly recommended. Low latency broadband is required for multiplayer.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, 7, Vista, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia / AMD (1GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0b
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound compatible
  • 備註: Gamepad is highly recommended. Low latency broadband is required for multiplayer.

data.name: Soul Saber 2
data.detailed_description:
Requirements

  • Gamepad is required for the best game experience.
  • Low latency broadband and port forwarding are required for multiplayer.
  • Please download Demo from right link, and check if your system fulfill the requirement.


About the Game


Extreme high speed (rip off)teamwork action has arrived on Steam, in the form of a shooting game!
As a Droid soldier, fight through the 6 on 6 team battle, and achieve victory!

19 characteristic battle droids

Female, Male, and Mech... Each droid has an individual designed model.
Earn victory points to unlock all of them!

Costume Break

Rip the pants off of your enemy, with clothing-affected battle damage!

Available Tactics

Melee, Fire support, High mobility, Defender, Sniper, and all-around types, various tactics are available.
All droids and weaponry have individual strengths and weaknesses.
Encounter battles where the stakes may change at any second, and maximize the advantage! It's simple, and supports customization for maximum enjoyment!

2 fully customizable sets of Control (Novice and Expert) supported!

2 Control sets(Novice and Expart) are supported, and both of them are fully customizable.
Even beginners will enjoy the high-speed battle from their first playthrough, but will act quicker, and more accurately depending on their skill level.

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP, 7, Vista, 8, 10
  • Processor: Core 2 Duo 2.4Ghz
  • Memory: 1000 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9.0b compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0b
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound compatible
  • Additional Notes: Gamepad is highly recommended. Low latency broadband is required for multiplayer.

  • Processor: Core i5
